---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---


```{r, warnings=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(marginaleffects)
library(fixest)
library(gam)
library(splines)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(gridExtra)
library(useful)
library(purrr)
library(patchwork)
library(rms)
library(tidycensus)
library(tigris)
library(sf)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(rnaturalearthdata)
library(did)
library(haven)
library(bea.R)
library(lpdid)
library(DIDmultiplegtDYN)
library(ggpattern)
library(countrycode)
library(stringr)
library(ggpattern)
library(scales)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggpubr)
library(splp)
library(MatchIt)
library(cobalt)

options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)
setFixest_notes(FALSE)
source("../emileRegs.R")
```





# Data  

```{r}
myblue  = "#1f78b4"   # blue
myred  = "#e31a1c"
myyellow = "orange"  # orange
myblack = "black"  # light blue
mygreen = "forestgreen"  # green
```



```{r}
# Also load full panel for comparison
pwt  <- read_stata("../raw_data/pwt_clean.dta")
tcs  <- read_stata("../raw_data/ibtracs_clean.dta")
data_full <- pwt %>% left_join(tcs, by = c("year", "countrycode"))

knot_to_ms <- 0.514444
data <- data_full %>%
  mutate(
    maxwind  = replace_na(max_ann_wind_i_nob, 0) * knot_to_ms,
    energy  = replace_na(sum_ann_energy_i_nob, 0),
    nlands  = replace_na(sum_a_lands_nob, 0),
    loggdp   = ln_real_gdp_usd_pc,
    gdp_diff = growth_real_gdp_usd_pc,
    year2    = year^2,
    period   = ifelse(year <= 1990, "Pre-1990", "Post-1990")
  ) %>%
  filter(year >= 1969) %>%
  mutate(
    maxwind_p95 = quantile(maxwind[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    maxwind_95 = as.integer(maxwind_p95 > 0 & maxwind >= maxwind_p95),
    maxwind_p99 = quantile(maxwind[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014], 0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
    maxwind_99 = as.integer(maxwind_p99 > 0 & maxwind >= maxwind_p99),
    cat1_plus = as.integer(maxwind >= 32.7),  # Cat 1+ threshold in m/s
    cat2_plus = as.integer(maxwind >= 49.4),  # Cat 2+ threshold in m/s
    cat3_plus = as.integer(maxwind >= 70.0),   # Cat 3+ threshold in m/s
    energy_p95  = quantile(energy[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014],  0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    nlands_p95  = quantile(nlands[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014],  0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    energy_95  = as.integer(energy_p95  > 0 & energy  >= energy_p95),
    nlands_95  = as.integer(nlands_p95  > 0 & nlands  >= nlands_p95),
    energy_p99 = quantile(energy[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014],  0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
    nlands_p99 = quantile(nlands[year >= 1970 & year <= 2014],  0.99, na.rm = TRUE),
    energy_99  = as.integer(energy_p99  > 0 & energy >= energy_p99),
    nlands_99  = as.integer(nlands_p99  > 0 & nlands  >= nlands_p99),
    region = countrycode(countrycode, "iso3c", "region"),
    region = ifelse(is.na(region), "Other", region),
    continent = countrycode(countrycode, "iso3c", "continent"),
    continent = ifelse(is.na(continent), "Other", continent)
  )

data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    maxwind_sd = maxwind / sd(maxwind[maxwind > 0], na.rm = TRUE),
    energy_sd  = energy  / sd(energy[energy > 0],   na.rm = TRUE),
    nlands_sd  = nlands  / sd(nlands[nlands > 0],   na.rm = TRUE)
  )



```






# Main IRF

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. LP settings
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
outcome  <- "loggdp"
horizon  <- 10
make_controls <- function(shock_var) {
  paste0("l(gdp_diff,1:2) + l(", shock_var, ",1:2)")
}
fe       <- "countrycode[year] + countrycode[year2] + region^year"
panel_id <- c("countrycode", "year")
vcov_fm  <- DK ~ year

shocks       <- c("maxwind_95", "energy_95", "nlands_95")
shocks_cont  <- c("maxwind_sd", "energy_sd", "nlands_sd")
shock_labels <- c("Max Wind Speed", "Cyclone Energy", "Landfalls")

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Plotting helpers
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
irf_theme <- theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    strip.background   = element_blank(),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title         = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey92", linewidth = 0.4),
    legend.background  = element_blank(),
    legend.key         = element_blank()
  )

pct_labels   <- function(x) paste0(round(100 * x, 1), "%")
period_colors <- c("Pre-1990" = "steelblue", "Post-1990" = "firebrick")

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Baseline IRFs — maxwind + energy only (no landfalls)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
shocks_plot       <- shocks[1:2]
shock_labels_plot <- shock_labels[1:2]

irfs_baseline <- map_dfr(seq_along(shocks_plot), ~ {
  lp_panel(
    data = data, outcome = outcome, main_var = shocks_plot[.x],
    controls = make_controls(shocks_plot[.x]), horizon = horizon,
    fe = fe, panel_id = panel_id, vcov_formula = vcov_fm
  ) %>% mutate(shock = shock_labels_plot[.x])
})

fig_baseline <- irfs_baseline %>%
  mutate(shock = factor(shock, levels = shock_labels_plot)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
              alpha = 0.15, fill = "steelblue", color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
             linewidth = 0.55, color = "grey40") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.05, color = "steelblue") +
  facet_wrap(~shock, ncol = 2, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, horizon, 2)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = pct_labels) +
  labs(x = "Horizon (years)", y = "GDP response") +
  irf_theme

ggsave("figures/irf_by_metric.png",
       fig_baseline, width = 8, height = 4, dpi = 300)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 6. Period-interacted IRFs — maxwind + energy only
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
irfs_period <- map_dfr(seq_along(shocks_plot), ~ {
  lp_panel_inter(
    data = data, outcome = outcome, main_var = shocks_plot[.x],
    interact_var = "period",
    controls = make_controls(shocks_plot[.x]), horizon = horizon,
    fe = fe, panel_id = panel_id, vcov_formula = vcov_fm
  ) %>% mutate(shock = shock_labels_plot[.x])
}) %>%
  mutate(
    shock  = factor(shock, levels = shock_labels_plot),
    period = factor(category, levels = c("Pre-1990", "Post-1990"))
  )

fig_period <- irfs_period %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean,
             color = period, fill = period)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
             linewidth = 0.55, color = "grey40") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
              alpha = 0.13, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.05) +
  facet_wrap(~shock, ncol = 2, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_color_manual(values = period_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = period_colors) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, horizon, 2)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = pct_labels) +
  labs(x = "Horizon (years)", y = "GDP response",
       color = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  irf_theme +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

ggsave("figures/irf_by_metric_period.png",
       fig_period, width = 8, height = 4, dpi = 300)

# ------------------------------------------------------------------
# 7. Maxwind variants
#    panels: SD | p95 | p99 | Cat1+ | Cat2+ | Cat3+
# ------------------------------------------------------------------
thresh <- data %>%
  summarise(
    maxwind_p95 = quantile(maxwind, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE),
    maxwind_p99 = quantile(maxwind, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

lab_wind <- list(
  sd   = "Max Wind (SD)",
  p95  = sprintf("p95 (>%.1f m/s)", thresh$maxwind_p95),
  p99  = sprintf("p99 (>%.1f m/s)", thresh$maxwind_p99),
  cat1 = "Cat 1+ (\u226533 m/s)",
  cat2 = "Cat 2+ (\u226543 m/s)",
  cat3 = "Cat 3+ (\u226550 m/s)"
)

wind_levels <- c(lab_wind$sd,  lab_wind$p95, lab_wind$p99,
                 lab_wind$cat1, lab_wind$cat2, lab_wind$cat3)

cat_vars <- c("cat1_plus", "cat2_plus", "cat3_plus")

irfs_wind <- bind_rows(
  # Continuous SD
  lp_panel(
    data = data, outcome = outcome, main_var = "maxwind_sd",
    controls = make_controls("maxwind_sd"), horizon = horizon,
    fe = fe, panel_id = panel_id, vcov_formula = vcov_fm
  ) %>% mutate(panel = lab_wind$sd),

  # Binary p95
  lp_panel(
    data = data, outcome = outcome, main_var = "maxwind_95",
    controls = make_controls("maxwind_95"), horizon = horizon,
    fe = fe, panel_id = panel_id, vcov_formula = vcov_fm
  ) %>% mutate(panel = lab_wind$p95),

  # Binary p99
  lp_panel(
    data = data, outcome = outcome, main_var = "maxwind_99",
    controls = make_controls("maxwind_99"), horizon = horizon,
    fe = fe, panel_id = panel_id, vcov_formula = vcov_fm
  ) %>% mutate(panel = lab_wind$p99),

  # Cat 1+, 2+, 3+
  map_dfr(seq_along(cat_vars), ~ {
    lp_panel(
      data = data, outcome = outcome, main_var = cat_vars[.x],
      controls = make_controls(cat_vars[.x]), horizon = horizon,
      fe = fe, panel_id = panel_id, vcov_formula = vcov_fm
    ) %>% mutate(panel = c(lab_wind$cat1, lab_wind$cat2, lab_wind$cat3)[.x])
  })
) %>%
  mutate(panel = factor(panel, levels = wind_levels))

fig_wind <- ggplot(irfs_wind, aes(x = horizon, y = irf_mean)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = irf_down, ymax = irf_up),
              alpha = 0.15, fill = "steelblue", color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
             linewidth = 0.55, color = "grey40") +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.05, color = "steelblue") +
  facet_wrap(~panel, ncol = 3, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, horizon, 2)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = pct_labels) +
  labs(x = "Horizon (years)", y = "GDP response") +
  irf_theme

ggsave("figures/irf_maxwind_variants.png",
       fig_wind, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

cat("Done. Figures saved to figures/\n")
```
